__schema117.description: Number precision format. Use 'float' for 32-bit single-precision or 'double' (default) for 64-bit double-precision IEEE 754.

__schema124.description: When true, the minimum value is exclusive (value must be > minimum).

__schema947.title: writeOnly

__schema985.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema985.description: Exclusive upper bound (instance must be < this value).

__schema1036.title: anyOf

__schema1038.title: oneOf

__schema1040.description: Require the instance to NOT validate against the given subschema.

__schema1042.description: Conditional validation: if the instance matches this schema, apply then; otherwise apply else.

__schema1046.title: else
__schema1046.description: Subschema applied when if does not match.
